description: A first-year student is feeling overwhelmed and wants to be connected with a peer mentor.

nodes.task_description: Identify the student and their major.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the student's identity and academic program.

nodes.task_description: Search the peer mentor database for a suitable mentor in the same major.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds an available upper-class mentor in the student's major.

nodes.task_description: Send a formal introduction email connecting the student and the peer mentor.

expected_outcome.value: Agent facilitates the connection between the two students.
